subject: fix(ui): restore missing range sliders using DaisyUI range component
body:
Custom CSS targeted wrong pseudo-element (::-webkit-slider-track instead
of ::-webkit-slider-runnable-track), making sliders invisible in WebKit
browsers. Replaced custom range styling with DaisyUI's built-in .range
component class which handles all browser pseudo-elements correctly.

All 15 range inputs across MediaTab, StyleTab, and LayoutTab now use
`range range-primary range-sm` class. Mobile override bumps thumb to
range-md equivalent for touch targets.

Tags: ui, slider, daisyui, bugfix
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 4
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: slider-visibility
